title: Combat Roll Potions
description: Adds potion effects that upgrade your rolling from the Combat Roll mod
body:
Requires [Combat Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll)

# Combat Roll Potions

This mod adds three potions that upgrade your rolling abilities.

### Agility Potion

![Agility Effect Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93177e557f611bdffa029a60666e594034059803.png)

The agility potion is brewed with an awkward potion and leather boots. It temporarily increases the distance of each roll by two blocks for each level.

### Recovery Potion
![Recovery Effect Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c915e0a09def112c27ec5d188db8f0619c8c875.png)

The recovery potion is brewed with an awkward potion and an amethyst shard. It temporarily increases the speed at which you recharge rolls.

### Stamina Potion

![Stamina Effect Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39064a961c46cff30032f91d1b11b248af9f2231.png)

The stamina potion is brewed with an awkward potion and a feather. It temporarily increases the maximum level of rolls you can have charged at once, increasing by one per level of the effect.

Feel free to use this in any modpacks.
